title: Gabe's Random BS
description: A random bs mod I threw together in the process of learning how to mod.
body:
A random bs mod I threw together in the process of learning how to mod.

!!! THIS MOD IS UNTESTED ON SERVERS !!!

- There's a textureless block, it's just the missing texture but craftable.
- There's a one pence coin, you can eat that.
- There's a netherite stick, completely useless but now you own a netherite stick.
- There's a gay block, it glows and sounds like amethyst.

Why would you want to download this mod? Well if you feel like copper is useless that could be one reason, as one pence coins require copper to be crafted, therefore giving copper another use.

If you want to use the missing texture asset in a build without actually having a block with no texture, you can do that.

If you want to waste your netherite ingots you can make a netherite stick that is literally less useful than a normal stick.

And if you want a glowing rainbow block that sounds like amethyst, this mod has that too.
